name: platform-skills
description: Platform engineering reference patterns and examples for Kubernetes, OpenShift, Argo CD, Flux CD, AWS, Azure, Terraform, and GitHub Actions - troubleshooting guides, production best practices, and working code
author: Nitin Jain
activation: When working with Kubernetes or OpenShift platforms, Argo CD or Flux GitOps deployments, AWS/Azure cloud infrastructure, Terraform/OpenTofu IaC, or GitHub Actions CI/CD - including troubleshooting reconciliation issues, debugging workloads, reviewing IAM policies, designing Helm or Kustomize repository structures, fixing GitHub Actions workflows, or making platform architecture decisions. Use one GitOps reconciler per ownership boundary unless the task is explicitly about migration
capabilities: Kubernetes platform baselines and workload patterns
Argo CD application and application set design
Flux CD troubleshooting and GitOps patterns
AWS service design and IAM best practices
Azure resource management and AKS operations
Terraform module architecture and state management
GitHub Actions workflow security and optimization
